title: CRM Integration
summary: Connect the client's CRM so deals and contacts sync with BuildVision, then validate with a real test record.
customerSummary: We connect your CRM so your deals and contacts stay in sync with BuildVision.
overview:
Wire up the client's CRM so **deals and contacts flow both ways** between their CRM and BuildVision. Authorize the connection, confirm it's healthy, and prove it end-to-end with a test record before moving on.

Capture the CRM system name and how credentials/auth will be provided during Intake.
prerequisites: CRM system name and auth path captured during intake
tips: Authorize with an account that has access to deals + contacts.
Validate with a real test deal/contact — don't assume the sync works from a green status alone.
warnings: CRM auth must complete with no permission errors before you test a sync.
The list of supported CRMs and the auth method for each is a known gap — see Process Gaps B-8.
commonMistakes: CRM connected but sync never validated with a real test record.
Authorizing with an account that lacks deals/contacts permissions.
Skipping the end-to-end gate and discovering mapping issues after go-live.

steps.customerLabel: Connect your CRM (or share access so we can set it up)
steps.title: Configure CRM integration
steps.description: Connect the CRM integration and authorize the deals + contacts sync.

callouts.text: The list of supported CRMs and the auth method for each is a known gap — see Process Gaps B-8.

steps.title: Verify the connection is live
steps.description: Confirm the CRM sync is authenticated and the connection status is healthy.
steps.verify: Connection status healthy; no auth or permission errors.

steps.title: Test CRM sync end-to-end (gate)
steps.description: Confirm a test deal/contact syncs from the CRM and appears correctly mapped in BuildVision.
steps.verify: Record appears correctly mapped in BuildVision.
